name: QHSLab, Inc.
summary: QHSLab, Inc. is a digital health company enabling independent primary care practices to identify and manage behavioral health conditions through workflow-integrated digital screening and non-face-to-face follow-up care. Its QHSLab platform supports structured assessments, automated documentation, EHR integration, and care management. The company also offers AllergiEnd, an allergy diagnostics and treatment service line featuring FDA-cleared disposable skin test applicators and immunotherapy support for primary care settings.
